description_long: This is a large, rounded ceramic vase with a wide, slightly flared rim and a bulbous body that tapers gently toward the base. The surface is matte and shows a natural, earthy beige color with patches of faded reddish pigment, suggesting age or weathering. The rim is thick and uneven, with a visible chip or break on one side, adding to its rustic character. The body is mostly smooth but has some subtle surface irregularities and discolorations, likely from use or exposure. The interior appears hollow and dark, indicating it is designed to hold contents. This vase would be well-suited for display in an outdoor urban garden, public plaza, or as a decorative element along a sidewalk.
description: A large, weathered ceramic vase with a wide rim, bulbous body, and faded reddish patches on a beige surface. The rim is chipped, and the finish is matte and rustic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full rounded body and wide, slightly flared rim with a smooth, mostly beige surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights a large chipped section on the rim and prominent reddish discoloration on the body.
description_view_2: Top-angled view reveals the hollow interior and the uneven, thick rim with visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a less damaged rim and a mostly plain surface with minor marks.
